summary: Deems arbitral tribunal orders enforceable as court orders
text: (2) Subject to any orders passed in an appeal under section 37, any order issued by the arbitral tribunal under this section shall be deemed to be an order of the Court for all purposes and shall be enforceable under the Code of Civil Procedure, 1908 (5 of 1908), in the same manner as if it were an order of the Court.] CHAPTER V Conduct of arbitral proceedings 18
